query:
UPDATE job
            SET status = ?
            WHERE workflow_id = ?
              AND status = ?
              AND id IN (
                  SELECT jbb.job_id
                  FROM job_depends_on jbb
                  WHERE jbb.depends_on_job_id = ?
                    AND jbb.workflow_id = ?
                    AND NOT EXISTS (
                        SELECT 1
                        FROM job_depends_on jbb2
                        JOIN job j2 ON jbb2.depends_on_job_id = j2.id
                        WHERE jbb2.job_id = jbb.job_id
                          AND jbb2.depends_on_job_id != ?
                          AND j2.status NOT IN (?, ?, ?, ?)
                    )
              )
            RETURNING id
